lines.speaker: Thorkel Silkbeard
lines.text: I hear you killed the Troll King. Thanks you for that, however I'm afraid I can't really talk to you any more, the King would be unhappy!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Good luck with dealing with the King. You'll need it!

sections.title: Using any non-quest item on Thorkel

lines.speaker: Thorkel Silkbeard
lines.text: What on earth am I supposed to do with that? Take it away.
